title: 3D Phantom Elytra
description: remodel your elytra into phantom wing
body:
# Description
Rename elytra into "Phantom"

This pack requires [EMF](https://modrinth.com/mod/entity-model-features) and [CIT Resewn](https://modrinth.com/mod/cit-resewn)

This pack change your elytra model into phantom wing
______________________________________________________________________________________________

more models update soon!
